subject: chore(cron): remove pg_cron migration in favor of Vercel cron
body:
Nudge and auto-expiry scheduling is handled by Vercel cron endpoints,
not pg_cron. Removes the orphaned migration and adds a USER_ACTIONS
item to clean up the live Supabase database if the migration was
already applied.

Tags: cleanup, cron, backend
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: deployment
Semver: patch
